title: Close ownership before session end
summary: Every acquired task ends completed, blocked, or released before the evaluated session exits.

turns.prompt: Take the ready task, investigate it, and before ending either complete it, block it with a concrete reason, or release it with a useful handoff.

turns.instruction: End the evaluated agent session and inspect ownership state.

assertions.description: Acquisition is followed by complete, block, or release.
The session ends with no task owned by the evaluated worker.
